name: Cheese Production Management
description: End-to-end cheese manufacturing from milk reception to packaging

name: Cheese Aging & Maturation
description: Monitoring and control of cheese aging caves including temperature and humidity
notes: Critical for product quality — drives CaveGuard IoT project

name: Quality Control & Certification
description: Product quality testing, AOP/DOP certification and compliance audits

name: Order-to-Cash
description: Customer order intake, fulfillment, invoicing and payment collection
notes: Includes B2B, B2C (La Boutique) and US distribution channels

name: Procure-to-Pay
description: Purchase requisition, supplier ordering, goods receipt and payment
notes: SAP-managed for HQ, Sage for NL and IT entities

name: Financial Consolidation
description: Monthly and quarterly consolidation of all four legal entities

name: Supply Chain Management
description: Raw material sourcing, cold chain logistics and international distribution
notes: Temperature-controlled throughout, includes US import logistics

name: Customer Relationship Management
description: Prospect management, client engagement and retention
notes: B2B via Salesforce, D2C via La Boutique, US via direct sales

name: Regulatory Compliance
description: Food safety regulations, traceability requirements and EU/FDA compliance
notes: EU and US food import regulations — drives Digital Cheese Passport project

name: Employee Lifecycle Management
description: Recruitment, onboarding, development and offboarding across all entities
notes: Four countries, four labor law frameworks — Workday HCM

name: IT Service Management
description: Incident management, change management and service requests

name: New Cheese Development
description: R&D pipeline for new cheese varieties and product innovation
notes: Current focus: plant-based cheese alternatives and aged cheese NFTs
